name: compliance closed-loop step control-mapping-to-rule links a control id to a satisfying rubric rule
command:
mkdir -p compliance && printf -- '- framework: nist-csf-2
  control_id: GV.OC
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule:no-eval]
  legal_review_status: pending
' > compliance/controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/closed-loop-test.sh" --step mapping-to-rule --controls compliance/controls.yaml --emit links 2>out.txt && grep -q 'control=GV.OC linked_to=no-eval' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
